raw.message: Kids are going nuts for this! Bounce your truck off the trampoline to get smashed! Then repair it and take down the tower! 💥

hook.summary: High-energy monster truck crash followed by a child's enthusiastic reaction.
hook.visual_action: A monster truck smashes into a toy tower, followed by a boy cheering and jumping.
hook.text_overlay: KIDS ARE GOING NUTS FOR THIS
hook.voiceover_transcript: Kids are going nuts for this. It's the new Monster Jam Smash & Bash

scene_flow: High-energy smash and child reaction hook.
Close-up demonstration of the truck jumping onto the tower's trampoline.
Showcase of the truck's 'smash' feature and the quick repair mechanism.
Launching the truck to completely topple the tower structure.
Closing shot of the happy child with the brand logo.
on_screen_text: IT'S QUICK AND EASY TO REPAIR
IF YOUR KIDS ARE MONSTER JAM FANS
audience_proxy: Parents of young children who enjoy high-energy, action-oriented toy vehicles and destruction play.
